summary: A Go-based CLI tool (SmokeSig) featuring a test runner, schema validation, and MCP integration, currently undergoing a significant binary and configuration rename.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated extra tests (glm-agents) may bloat the codebase and slow down CI
Ongoing SmokeSig rename indicates recent instability or incomplete refactoring
Untracked and unstaged files during a rename refactor suggest potential merge conflicts or lost work
Deeply nested agent-generated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/...) add structural noise
suggestions: Finalize and commit the SmokeSig rename to stabilize the main branch
Evaluate consolidating or pruning redundant agent-generated extra tests
Add .gitignore rules or archive scripts for historical agent test runs
Ensure all import paths are fully updated post-rename to prevent runtime failures
